name: afip-monday-backend
description: Backend para Facturación Electrónica AFIP - Monday App

scripts.copy-frontend: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const src=path.join(__dirname,'..','frontend-repo','dist');const dst=path.join(__dirname,'public');if(fs.existsSync(dst))fs.rmSync(dst,{recursive:true,force:true});function cp(s,d){fs.mkdirSync(d,{recursive:true});for(const f of fs.readdirSync(s)){const sp=path.join(s,f),dp=path.join(d,f);fs.statSync(sp).isDirectory()?cp(sp,dp):fs.copyFileSync(sp,dp)}}if(fs.existsSync(src)){cp(src,dst);console.log('Frontend copied to public/')}else{console.log('No dist found, skipping')}"
